description: Grounded = concrete data, citations, mechanical. Lyrical = rhythmic, emotional, the dog, the streetlights.

s00_opening.label: lyrical
s00_opening.note: The walk sets the rhythm. Conversational, embodied.

s01_brains_rgb.label: grounded
s01_brains_rgb.note: EEG data, millisecond timing. Let the numbers land.

s02_dogs_computation.label: balanced
s02_dogs_computation.note: Technical but alive. 'Running a query' is the lyrical punch.

s03_color_you_cant_see.label: lyrical
s03_color_you_cant_see.note: Emotional pivot. 'Every face you love.' Earn the feeling.

s04_what_engineers_found.label: grounded
s04_what_engineers_found.note: Engineering precision. The juxtaposition does the work.

s05_mantis_shrimp_problem.label: balanced
s05_mantis_shrimp_problem.note: Analytical but building to a big idea. The Hofstadter line needs both registers.

s06_what_im_building.label: balanced
s06_what_im_building.note: Honest, uncertain, practical. 'Mad scientist' is self-aware.

s07_coda.label: lyrical
s07_coda.note: Sodium orange, the water bowl, the front door. Pure return.
